C:\Users\HP\AppData\Local\stm32cube\bundles\cmake\4.0.1+st.3\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\rocketsim.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\rocketsim.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\rocketsim.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\rocketsim.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o rocketsim.exe -Wl,--out-implib,librocketsim.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\rocketsim.dir\linkLibs.rsp
